title: feat: allowlist Minor-fun + morriszdweck + mikl-shortcuts for community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Adds 3 GitHub IDs to `COMMUNITY_MODEL_ALLOWED_GITHUB_IDS` per Discord requests in #dev-models
- `Minor-fun` (45744798), `morriszdweck` (178960782, Discord: Mincofficial), `mikl-shortcuts` (219871313)

gist.headline: New bees in the model garden
gist.blurb: We've handed the keys to three new community members to host their own AI models on the network. Can't wait to see what Minor-fun, morriszdweck, and mikl-shortcuts bring to the hive!
gist.summary: Added GitHub IDs for Minor-fun, morriszdweck, and mikl-shortcuts to the community model allowlist.
gist.impact: These three developers can now register and serve their own custom AI models directly through the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: The bee welcoming three new friends (represented by small, friendly robots) into a glowing garden where code-plants grow. Represents adding new community members to the ecosystem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming three small, friendly pixel robots into a glowing digital garden where code-plants sprout from the soil. The robots are holding tiny glowing seeds. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming three small, friendly pixel robots into a glowing digital garden where code-plants sprout from the soil. The robots are holding tiny glowing seeds. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
